title: Infant Regulation Graph Legend
subtitle: Legend for visualizer_graph_final.txt. Styling notes describe the graph metadata without changing the PC graph structure.

items.label: Infant context
items.description: Infant_Age and Gestational_Age use the infant-context node color.

items.label: Parent wellbeing
items.description: Parent_Wellbeing uses the parent-wellbeing node color.

items.label: Crying
items.description: Crying_Frequency and Crying_Distress share the crying node color.

items.label: Sleep
items.description: Sleep_Duration and Sleep_Problem share the sleep node color.

items.label: Soothing
items.description: Soothing_Response uses the soothing node color.

items.label: Feeding
items.description: Feeding_Ease and Feeding_Difficulty share the feeding node color.

items.label: Directed edge
items.description: A -> B is encoded as tail at the source and arrow at the target.

items.label: Undirected edge
items.description: A -- B is encoded as a tail endpoint on both variables.

items.label: Weight
items.description: The TXT stores each edge weight in square brackets as weight=..., which the importer preserves as edge weight.

items.label: Confidence
items.description: The TXT stores bootstrap stability as confidence=..., which the importer preserves in edge attributes.

items.label: Labels
items.description: Use the viewer edge-label controls to show weight or confidence values on the graph.
